demographics.living_situation: lives in a supported accommodation facility with disability support workers

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The skin got stuck behind the head of my penis during washing, and now the tip is completely swollen, turning purple, and the pain is unbearable.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It happened about two hours ago while I was washing and I can't get the skin back forward — the head is really swollen and the colour looks wrong and it hurts so much I can't stand anything touching it.

symptom_narrative.onset: about two hours ago during routine washing, when the skin was pulled back and would not go forward again
symptom_narrative.character: the head of the penis is swollen and tight and the colour is going dark/purple; there is a tight band of puffy skin sitting behind the head
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: unbearable — the worst pain, cannot bear any clothing or touch
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the head of the penis and the skin just behind it
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant and worsening since it started
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing — a cold pack was tried and it did not help
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any touch or movement, and it keeps swelling on its own
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: immobile, lying down in severe distress, cannot tolerate clothing

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: keeps getting infections and soreness under the foreskin
past_medical_history.how_managed: treated in the past when it flares up

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: the skin at the tip has always been tight and looks scarred and white

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives in a supported accommodation facility; a disability support worker is present and helping with the call

objective_data_offered.value: the head of the penis looks very swollen and tense with a dark red / purple colour, and there is a ring of puffy skin trapped just behind it
support worker reports the resident is crying out in pain, cannot bear anything touching the area, and is lying still because it hurts so much
support worker says the resident is still able to pass urine and has not stopped being able to wee
a cold compress had been placed on the area by the support worker to try to help
